it:58.3: "Tisso imā, bhikkhave, taṇhā. Katamā tisso? Kāmataṇhā, bhavataṇhā, vibhavataṇhā – imā kho, bhikkhave, tisso taṇhā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:58.5:
Ye ca taṇhaṁ pahantvāna,
vītataṇhā bhavābhave;
Te ve pāraṅgatā loke,
ye pattā āsavakkhayan"ti.
it:58.6:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Navamaṁ.
